takeaway.text: **iPhone 17 Pro runs a 400B LLM locally (562 pts, 259 comments) — the highest-engagement local AI story in tracking history, surpassing "Can I run AI locally?" (1,295 pts, Mar 14) in signal density by demonstrating consumer mobile hardware running frontier-scale models.** GPT-5.4 Pro confirmed solving an open math problem by Epoch (255 pts, 181 comments) — first independent verification of a frontier model achieving genuine mathematical discovery, two months after GPT-5's initial claim. **everything-claude-code crosses the 100K star milestone (+4,458/day, 102,780 total)** — first Claude Code ecosystem project to hit six figures, sustaining multi-week explosive growth.
